productDisplayName: Puma Kids Unisex Future Cat Red Casual Shoes
description: Designed for everyday wear, the cat range of puma sneakers embodies excitement and energy for life. The Future Cat M2 comes with synthetic overlays on the sides with a textured backfoot finish. The outsoles with horizontal grips mean these shoes provide excellent grip, making them perfect for urban wear.UpperFeatures a low-profile design for durabilityPremium leather upper for longer wearBold, contrasting formstripe outliningLightly padded tongue and collar for extra comfortAsymmetrical lacing system gives a snug FitTextile lining with cushioned footbed for enhanced comfortEmbroidered formstripe on the lateral foot, embroidered puma cat on the medial foot and cat logo embossed on the lateral toeMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort, impact protection and stabilityOutsoleTPR outsole for enhanced tractionEmbedded puma Future Cat embedded on the rubber outsoleOutsole reinforced onto the upper as a heel guardshoe careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
